items.title: Messi, Qatar and a mailbox in Kozhikode: The story of a 500-piece FIFA World Cup stamp collection
items.summary: ​For more than three decades, a Kozhikode philatelist has documented FIFA World Cup history through philately, building a collection of nearly 500 commemorative stamps
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 30
items.summary: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Dialling in on clear plans' the key to massive Hope-Greaves stand
items.summary: "He's shown that he's capable of scoring runs in all conditions against all bowling line-ups," Shai Hope said of Justin Greaves after the two added 242
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
